content: Too many of us are not living our dreams because we are living our fears.
note: 我们太多人没有实现梦想，因为我们活在恐惧中。

content: Reed leaves wrap rice scent, and also a thousand years of longing.
note: 粽叶裹着米香，也裹着千年的想念。

content: One smile can warm another person's heart.
note: 一个微笑，可以点燃另一颗心。

content: Dark clouds fringed with gold are where the light struggles through.
note: 乌云镶着金边，是光在努力穿透。

content: Not seeking fleeting acclaim, But only that the echoes linger on.
note: 不争一时之响，只求余音绵长。

content: A smile is the shortest bridge.
note: 微笑是最短的桥。

content: The eraser wears itself away.
note: 橡皮擦消耗着自己。

content: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
note: 你不射门，就永远得不了分。

content: The scent of green lime cuts through the stifling air.
note: 青柠的气味切开沉闷。

content: The door closed on the story just now.
note: 门合上了刚才的故事。

content: Shadows are sketches made of light.
note: 影子是光做的素描。

content: Memory sometimes short-circuits.
note: 记忆有时会短路。

content: Go forth—the outcome will give you the answer.
note: 去做吧，结果会给你答案。

content: You are stronger than you imagine.
note: 你比自己想象的更强大。

content: Trust time. Good things grow slowly.
note: 相信时间。美好的事物需要慢慢生长。

content: Wheat awns pierce the dawn. Farmers bend to pick up gold.
note: 麦芒刺破晨光，农人弯腰拾起金黄。

content: Between the unread pages dwells the silence of a long hallway.
note: 未读完的书页间，栖居着寂静的走廊。

content: The pendulum sways, counting time's soft joints.
note: 钟摆摇晃，数着时间柔软的骨节。

content: Sunlight pools where shadows used to live.
note: 阳光在曾是阴影的地方积成了水洼。

content: Don't grow up today. Be a happy kid for one day.
note: 今天不长大，做一天快乐的小孩。

content: Light lingers, reluctant to say goodbye.
note: 光线流连着，不舍得说再见。

content: No one is useless who lightens another’s burden.
note: 减轻他人负担的人绝非无用。

content: Gardenias bloom, turning the yard white with scent.
note: 栀子花开了，整个院子都是白色的香气。

content: By the pond, kids splash water with bare feet.
note: 池塘边，孩子们光着脚丫踩水花。

content: The wind carries a softer, greener scent.
note: 风捎来更柔软、更青翠的气息。

content: The sound of a cut watermelon is summer's sweetest hello.
note: 西瓜切开的声音，是夏天最动听的问候。

content: Clouds drift like thoughts, light and slow.
note: 云如思绪，轻轻缓缓地飘。

content: After rain, a rainbow bridges the sky and the earth.
note: 雨后彩虹像一座桥，连接天空和大地。

content: Each of us is more than our worst mistake.
note: 我们每个人都超越了自己最糟的错误。

content: A dragonfly stands on a lotus tip, still like a guard.
note: 蜻蜓立在荷尖上，一动不动像个哨兵。

content: Wheat grains grow full; the rain comes more often.
note: 麦粒渐满，雨水增多。

content: Light stretches longer, painting walls gold.
note: 日光拉得更长，把墙壁染成金色。

content: Lazy afternoon sun is good for half a book.
note: 午后阳光慵懒，适合读半本书。

content: Cherries turn red, like a shy girl's cheeks.
note: 樱桃开始泛红，像少女害羞的脸颊。

content: Under the shade, ants work hard carrying summer.
note: 树荫下，蚂蚁们忙着搬运夏天。

content: I’ve found 10,000 ways that won’t work.
note: 我找到了10,000种行不通的方法。

content: Roses climb the fence, blooming pink dreams one by one.
note: 蔷薇爬满篱笆，开出一朵朵粉色的梦。

content: The wheat bows in the wind, making green waves.
note: 麦田在风中泛起绿色的波浪。

content: Rain taps on the window, like a quiet whisper.
note: 雨水轻轻敲着窗，像在说悄悄话。

content: A soft breeze brings the scent of locust flowers, sweetening the way home.
note: 微风送来槐花香，甜了归途。

content: The calendar turns, and time quietly flows forward.
note: 日历翻动，时间静静流淌向前。

content: A mother's love blows like the May wind, soft and long.
note: 母亲的爱像五月的风，温柔而绵长。

content: You can, you should, and if you’re brave, you will.
note: 你可以，你应该，若你勇敢，你会做到。

content: I’ve nothing to do today but smile.
note: 你今天唯一能做的事就是微笑。

content: Wild flowers on the ridge quietly weave a colorful blanket.
note: 田埂上的野花，悄悄铺成彩毯。

content: The smell of wet earth brings peace to the heart.
note: 雨后泥土的气息让人心安。

content: A cool breeze still visits, saying goodbye to spring.
note: 凉风偶尔到访，与春天告别。

content: Youth like morning light holds endless promise.
note: 青年如晨光，充满无限可能。

content: When clouds part, the sky reveals its pale blue base.
note: 云层散开时，天空露出淡蓝的底色。

content: Here comes the sun. And I say, it’s all right.
note: 阳光来了，我说，一切都好。

content: All labor that uplifts humanity has dignity and importance.
note: 所有提升人类的劳动都具有尊严和重要性。

content: Let your mistakes be the compost for your future garden.
note: 让你的错误，成为未来花园的养料。

content: The most beautiful melodies come from instruments that were carved.
note: 最美妙的旋律，来自被精心雕琢的乐器。

content: Growth is not a straight line, but a spiral reaching higher.
note: 成长不是直线，而是盘旋上升的螺旋。

content: Small acts of kindness are the stars that navigate lost ships.
note: 微小的善行，是为迷航的船只引路的星星。

content: You are the painter of skies you have yet to see.
note: 你是那片你尚未见过的天空的画师。

content: Hope and love truly make every challenge a little easier.
note: 希望与爱让每个挑战变得更容易。

content: Every sunset is a promise of a dawn we haven't met.
note: 每一次日落，都是对我们尚未谋面的黎明的承诺。

content: The butterfly's beauty is born from the caterpillar's patience.
note: 蝴蝶的美丽，诞生于毛虫的耐心。

content: A kind word is a boomerang that returns with warmth.
note: 一句善意的话，是带着温暖飞回的回旋镖。

content: The moon doesn't need to be full to light the path.
note: 月亮不必圆满，也能照亮前路。

content: Rain awakens the seeds sleeping in your heart.
note: 谷雨唤醒你心中沉睡的种子。

content: Bamboo grows skyward by bending with the wind.
note: 竹子向天生长，靠的是随风俯身。

content: Within you is a stillness vast enough to hold every storm.
note: 你的内心深处，有一片足以容纳所有风暴的宁静。

content: Raindrops never compete; they all reach the ground together.
note: 雨滴从不竞争，它们终将一起抵达大地。

content: Your thoughts are gardeners; tend only to the flowers.
note: 你的思绪是园丁，只去照料那些花朵吧。

content: Hope is the feather that balances the stone of today.
note: 希望是那根羽毛，平衡着今日的顽石。

content: Every scar on the earth becomes a valley or a river.
note: 大地上的每道伤痕，最终都成了山谷或河流。

content: Your potential is a universe; don't settle for being a single star.
note: 你的潜力是一个宇宙，别满足于做一颗孤星。

content: Life is short; smile while you still have teeth.
note: 人生苦短，趁牙齿未落微笑。

content: Forward ever, backward never.
note: 永远向前，绝不后退。

content: Your heartbeat is the drum of a journey only you can walk.
note: 你的心跳，是那场独属于你的征程的战鼓。

content: The mountain never moves, yet it teaches the clouds to dance.
note: 山峦岿然不动，却教会了云朵如何舞蹈。

content: Waves do not fear the shore; they embrace their ending as a new beginning.
note: 海浪不畏惧海岸，它把终结拥作新的开端。

content: The seed believes in spring while winter still rages.
note: 当冬天还在肆虐，种子已经相信春天。

content: The path is made by walking, not by waiting for signs.
note: 路是走出来的而不是等待征兆。

content: Rain cleanses yesterday's tears; new green appears.
note: 雨洗昨日泪，新绿悄然生。

content: Each fallen petal makes room for the fruit to come.
note: 每一片落花，都为果实让出未来的位置。

content: The river does not hurry; it simply knows the sea.
note: 河流不急于赶路，它只是知道海的方向。

content: Roots grow deep in the dark, so the tree can trust the light.
note: 根在黑暗中深扎，树才能信任光明。

content: Dawn breaks not with a shout, but with a quiet glow.
note: 黎明不以喧嚣降临，而以静默的光绽放。

content: March ends with a promise in its pocket.
note: 三月将尽，口袋里装着一个承诺。

content: Rain stitches the earth with silver thread.
note: 雨用银线把大地细细缝起。

content: Warm rain writes poems on the window.
note: 温润的雨在窗上写诗。

content: White petals fall like snow, but softer.
note: 白色的花瓣飘落如雪，却更温柔。

content: If the future does not come to me, I will walk toward the future.
note: 未来不来，我便向未来走去。

content: You can draw a new picture each day.
note: 你每天都可以绘制一幅新画面。

content: Each day adds strength to your story.
note: 每一天都为你的故事增添力量。

content: Past lessons are gifts for tomorrow.
note: 过去的经验是给明天的礼物。

content: Endings make room for new starts.
note: 结束为新开始腾出空间。

content: Cherry blossoms blush before they bloom.
note: 樱花在盛开前先红了脸颊。

content: Plan your path with care and a smile.
note: 带着细心和微笑规划你的路途。

content: Day and night shake hands in perfect balance.
note: 白昼与黑夜握手，达成完美的平衡。

content: Dandelions write suns on the lawn.
note: 蒲公英在草坪上写下一个个小太阳。

content: Life stirs in every crack and corner.
note: 生命在每道缝隙和角落醒来。

content: Warmth shared comes back to you.
note: 温暖的分享终将回馈于你。

content: Grass grows an inch while no one watches.
note: 无人注意时，草长高了一寸。

content: Your own light shows the way forward.
note: 你自身的光芒照亮前路。

content: The heart, like a still pond, reflects all things without disturbance.
note: 心如静水，无波不映。

content: Listen to your innermost self.
note: 倾听内心深处。
